angle_used: Pain: chasing painters / no surface damage
subject: Commercial paint sub that doesn't go dark
body:
Hi Steve,

Quick intro — Ashrah Painting, Winnipeg-based commercial.

Most painting subs make your PM chase. Status calls, missed updates, dings on finished surfaces at handoff. We do it differently: Lumia auto-reports daily plus answers your PM on demand. Six-day delay forecasting. Pro cleaning at handoff with no surface damage.

Open to a 10-minute call?
signals_used: None — site unreachable, web search inconclusive.
needs_review_flags: Email domain has typo ('weastren' vs. 'western') — verify domain before send.
Generic anchor — consider deferring until we have actual signals on this company.
